gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/part_of.snippet: ser-6 annotated to GO:1904122 positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by octopamine signaling pathway (IMP)

gomodel:run-figure1/tbh1/part_of.snippet: tbh-1 annotated to GO:0006589 octopamine biosynthetic process (IMP)

gomodel:run-figure1/nhr76/part_of.snippet: nhr-76 annotated to GO:1904123 and GO:1904122 (IMP); acts in intestine downstream of both 5-HT and Oct signaling

gomodel:run-figure1/atgl1/part_of.snippet: atgl-1 annotated to GO:0019433 triglyceride catabolic process (IEA/IBA)

gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/occurs_in.justification: The figure explicitly places tph-1 in the ADF chemosensory neuron; CL:0000393 is the closest available CL term for a sensory neuron. ADF-specific CL is not separately catalogued in standard ontologies.

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/occurs_in.snippet: mod-1 annotated to GO:0005886 plasma membrane (IDA)

gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/occurs_in.snippet: ser-6 annotated to GO:0005886 plasma membrane (IEA/IBA)

gomodel:run-figure1/atgl1/occurs_in.snippet: atgl-1 annotated to GO:0005811 lipid droplet (IDA)

gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panel E: tph-1 in ADF produces serotonin (5-HT) which activates mod-1 serotonin-gated chloride channel in URX neuron via labeled arrow '5-HT'.

gomodel:run-figure1/tbh1/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panel E: tbh-1 in RIC synthesizes octopamine (Oct), which signals to ser-6 octopamine receptor in AWB via dashed arrow labeled 'Oct'.

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panel E: endocrine signal arrow from NEURONS (URX/mod-1) to INTESTINE (nhr-76); mod-1 in URX mediates 5-HT signal that drives intestinal nhr-76 activity (GO:1904123 IMP).

gomodel:run-figure1/ser6/causal/gomodel:.snippet: ser-6 annotated to GO:1904122 positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by octopamine signaling pathway (IMP); octopamine signal from AWB/ser-6 reaches intestinal nhr-76.

gomodel:run-figure1/nhr76/causal/gomodel.snippet: Panel E INTESTINE: arrow from nhr-76 directly to ATGL/atgl-1 indicating transcriptional activation; nhr-76 annotated to GO:0045944 positive regulation of transcription by RNA Pol II (IMP).

gomodel:run-figure1/tph1/causal/gomodel:.justification: Panels A and B of the figure show that tph-1 mutants have significantly reduced Patgl-1::GFP fluorescence compared to wild-type, indicating tph-1 (serotonin signaling) is required for full atgl-1 expression in the intestine. No PMID was retrieved by tool calls, but the curator-intent JSON cites this panel evidence with confidence 0.95.

gomodel:run-figure1/mod1/causal/gomodel:.snippet: Panels C and D: dominant-negative mod-1SAS in URX (Pflp-8::mod-1SAS) blocks 5-HT-induced increase in Patgl-1::GFP; mod-1 annotated to GO:1904123 positive regulation of fatty acid beta-oxidation by serotonin receptor signaling pathway (IMP).
